positive: A whimsical, watercolor illustration of a group of friendly forest animals (fox, owl, badger) having a picnic in a sun-dappled meadow. The style is highly detailed storybook art, vibrant colors, and soft edges. Cinematic lighting, storybook illustration, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, grayscale, photorealistic
